narrative:
Walnut Twp (precinct in Gallia County) has 466 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 21.5 percentage points.
